frontmatter.title: Using RTK Query with GraphQL
frontmatter.description: RTK Query is awesome! But how do you use it with GraphQL?

frontmatter.title: Writing macros that consume ClojureScript code
frontmatter.description: We'll discuss two ways to make acros that we can both use in ClojureScript and that also use ClojureScript code. First, we'll take a look at the quickest way to write a macro in ClojureScript (that also uses ClojureScript code). Afterwards we will take a look at a similar solution that uses two files.
